id: list-organization-activity

</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/orgs/{orgId}/activity"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns naming operations for the organization, optionally scoped to a namespace and limited to a maximum number of rows.
